variants.title: Donaldson P550148 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the FilterFinder FF200110B
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P550148 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the FilterFinder FF200110B
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550148 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On provides dependable protection for hydraulic systems by efficiently removing particulates and contaminants. It ensures clean hydraulic fluid, promoting smooth operation and extending the lifespan of critical system components. With its easy-to-install spin-on design, this filter minimizes downtime and maintenance costs. Its durable construction and advanced filtration media make it a trusted choice for industrial and mobile hydraulic applications requiring reliable performance.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 129.0 mm, Length: 182.0 mm, Thread: 1 1/4" BSP, Δ Collapse Pressure: 12 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Collapse Pressure: 12 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Mann Filter W 1374/2 Hydraulics | Replaces the FilterFinder FF200110B
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter W 1374/2 Hydraulics | Replaces the FilterFinder FF200110B
variants.description: MANN-FILTER spin-on hydraulic filters offer maximum filtration performance and thus ensure trouble-free operation of the hydraulic system. Thanks to the filter medium, which is specially adapted to the intended use, the finest impurities are separated from the hydraulic fluid.
specifications: Style: Hydraulics, Dimension A: 135.0 mm, Dimension B: 100.0 mm, Dimension C: 111.0 mm, Dimension G: G 1 1/4, Dimension H: 177.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 129.0 mm, Length: 182.0 mm, Media Type: Cellulose, Thread: 1 1/4" BSP, Collapse Pressure: 12 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 63161 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the FilterFinder FF200110B
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 63161 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the FilterFinder FF200110B
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 63161 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 128.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 127.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 106.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 1"1/4-BSP, Height 1 (H1): 177.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 175.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 4.5 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 129.0 mm, Length: 182.0 mm, Media Type: Cellulose, Thread: 1 1/4" BSP, Collapse Pressure: 12 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.title: Fleetguard HF7980 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the FilterFinder FF200110B
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard HF7980 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the FilterFinder FF200110B
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF7980 premium hydraulic spin-on filter with synthetic media is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.

variants.title: Hydac 0160 MG 010 P Spin-On Filter | Replaces the FilterFinder FF200110B
variants.option1Value: Hydac 0160 MG 010 P Spin-On Filter | Replaces the FilterFinder FF200110B
variants.description: Genuine Hydac 0160 MG 010 P Spin-On Filter. Built to HYDAC’s OEM specifications and quality standards, this genuine part offers reliable performance, long service life and a precise fit. It’s suitable for a wide range of hydraulic and process applications, helping protect equipment, reduce downtime and maintain system cleanliness. For best results, match the part code to your equipment manual and verify key dimensions and ratings (size, connection, filtration grade/flow) before installation.
